ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the product was launched */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes received by the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment data entry */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being analyzed */,
  "amazing" INTEGER /* Count of the word 'amazing' in the text */,
  "love" INTEGER /* Count of the word 'love' in the text */,
  "horrible" INTEGER /* Count of the word 'horrible' in the text */,
  "bad" INTEGER /* Count of the word 'bad' in the text */,
  "terrible" INTEGER /* Count of the word 'terrible' in the text */,
  "awful" INTEGER /* Count of the word 'awful' in the text */,
  "wow" INTEGER /* Count of the word 'wow' in the text */,
  "hate" INTEGER /* Count of the word 'hate' in the text */,
  "sentiment" INTEGER /* Sentiment score (1 for positive, 0 for negative) */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Sentiment label (e.g., 'positive', 'negative') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment score */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being scored */,
  "sentiment_score" INTEGER /* Sentiment score (1 for positive, 0 for negative) */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Sentiment label (e.g., 'positive', 'negative') */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_scores_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_words" (
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment word */,
  "word" TEXT /* The sentiment word */,
  "sentiment_score" INTEGER /* Sentiment score (1 for positive, -1 for negative, 0 for neutral) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the sentiment word (e.g., 'adjective', 'adverb') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being provided feedback for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sentiment category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sentiment category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the time period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time period */,
  "positive_count" INTEGER /* Count of positive sentiment reviews */,
  "negative_count" INTEGER /* Count of negative sentiment reviews */,
  "neutral_count" INTEGER /* Count of neutral sentiment reviews */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product during the time period */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Average confidence score of the sentiment analysis during the time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_reports_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_reports_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_reports_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each token */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being tokenized */,
  "token_text" TEXT /* Text of the token */,
  "token_type" TEXT /* Type of the token (e.g., word, punctuation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tokens_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topic_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic model */,
  "num_topics" INTEGER /* Number of topics in the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topic_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic assignment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being assigned */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic model */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  "topic_weight" REAL /* Weight of the topic in the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_assignments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_assignments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES topic_models ("model_id")
)
